sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ صُنْعُ الْمُحْتَوَى مِهْنَةً جَدِيدَةً وَمُمْتِعَةً فِي عَصْرِنَا.
sentences.translation: Kreiranje sadržaja postalo je nova i zanimljiva profesija u našem dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Content creation has become a new and enjoyable profession in our era.

sentences.arabic: يُصَوِّرُ بَعْضُ الشَّبَابِ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو تَعْلِيمِيَّةً أَوْ تَرْفِيهِيَّةً.
sentences.translation: Neki mladi ljudi snimaju edukativne ili zabavne video snimke.
sentences.translationEn: Some young people film educational or entertaining video clips.

sentences.arabic: يُشَارِكُونَ هَذِهِ الْمَقَاطِعَ مَعَ الْمَلَايِينِ مِنَ الْمُتَابِعِينَ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Dijele ove snimke sa milionima pratilaca širom svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: They share these clips with millions of followers around the world.
